summary: Iteration 62: CEO Dashboard Enterprise Overhaul - ALL TESTS PASSED. Complete testing of CEO Dashboard with sidebar navigation (8 sections), 6 stat cards, 3 inventory cards (Sentinel X/J/S), 3 charts (bar/line/pie), notification bell, health check indicators, security overview, reports with CSV export, and SEO Phase 3 (robots.txt, sitemap.xml).
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/heartbeat returns {alive:true, ts:...}
BACKEND: GET /api/health returns {status:healthy, database:healthy}
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/promo-status returns promo counters (50/50 basic, 200/200 plazas, 20% discount)
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login with ceo@manoprotect.com/19862210Des returns user with role:admin
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/stats returns dashboard stats (users, subscriptions, orders, refunds, promo, revenue, messages, inventory, alerts)
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/chart-data returns users_by_month, revenue_by_month, plan_distribution
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/notifications returns auto-generated notifications from pending items
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/security-overview returns admin_users, two_factor_enabled_count, failed_login_attempts
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/inventory returns paginated inventory items
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/inventory?product=sentinel_x filters correctly
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/security-logs returns admin activity logs
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/users returns paginated user list with search
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/subscriptions returns paginated subscriptions
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/orders returns paginated orders
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/refunds returns paginated refunds
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/messages returns paginated contact messages
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/activity returns recent activity feed
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/export/users returns CSV file
BACKEND: GET /api/ceo/export/payments returns CSV file
BACKEND: Unauthenticated requests to /api/ceo/stats return 401/403
SEO: GET /robots.txt returns valid robots.txt with Allow/Disallow directives
SEO: GET /sitemap.xml returns valid sitemap with all SEO landing pages
SEO: sitemap.xml includes /reloj-sos-ancianos, /reloj-gps-mayores, /boton-sos-senior
SEO: sitemap.xml includes /proteccion-phishing, /proteccion-fraude-online, /seguridad-digital-familiar
FRONTEND: Login page loads and accepts credentials
FRONTEND: CEO Dashboard (/ceo) loads with sidebar navigation
FRONTEND: Sidebar shows 8 menu items (Dashboard, Inventario, Usuarios, Membresías, Pagos, Seguridad, Mensajes, Reportes)
FRONTEND: Dashboard shows 6 stat cards (Usuarios, Suscripciones, Ventas Mes, Pedidos, Reembolsos, Mensajes)
FRONTEND: Dashboard shows 3 inventory cards (Sentinel X, Sentinel J, Sentinel S with stock levels)
FRONTEND: Dashboard shows 3 charts (Usuarios por Mes bar, Ingresos por Mes line, Distribución Planes pie)
FRONTEND: Notification bell shows count and opens notification panel
FRONTEND: Backend LIVE and Frontend LIVE indicators visible in header
FRONTEND: Usuarios section shows user table with search input and CSV export
FRONTEND: Inventario section shows inventory table
FRONTEND: Membresías section shows subscriptions table
FRONTEND: Pagos section shows refunds table with approve/reject buttons (empty state: 'Sin reembolsos')
FRONTEND: Seguridad section shows admin users, 2FA count, failed login count
FRONTEND: Mensajes section shows messages table
FRONTEND: Reportes section shows CSV export links (Usuarios, Pagos) and financial summary (MRR, Hoy, Este Mes, Total)
FRONTEND: /plans page shows live promo counters (50/50 basic, 200/200 plazas)
FRONTEND: /plans page shows Plan Mensual 9,99€/mes and Plan Anual 99,99€/año
ZIP: GET /manoprotect-com.zip returns downloadable ZIP file (2.1MB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CEO Dashboard Enterprise Edition fully functional. Key routes: /ceo requires admin role authentication. All sidebar sections work: Dashboard (stats, charts, inventory, promo), Inventario (table), Usuarios (search, CSV), Membresías (table), Pagos (refunds with approve/reject), Seguridad (admin users, 2FA, failed logins), Mensajes (table), Reportes (CSV exports, financial summary). Health endpoints: /api/heartbeat (ping), /api/health (DB status). Promo status: /api/ceo/promo-status is PUBLIC. Chart data: /api/ceo/chart-data returns 3 chart datasets. Notifications: /api/ceo/notifications auto-generates from pending refunds, unread messages, failed payments, new users. SEO Phase 3: robots.txt and sitemap.xml include all landing pages.

ceo_dashboard_notifications.auto_generated: From pending refunds, unread messages, failed payments, new users

seo_phase3.robots_txt: /robots.txt - Allow public pages, Disallow admin/api routes
seo_phase3.sitemap_xml: /sitemap.xml - All pages including SEO landing pages

mocked_apis.note: All data comes from real MongoDB queries
